prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 6894→4957→10758→9186→5059，波动极大，2023 年曾暴跌至约 10758 名，2025 年大幅回升至约 5059 名，近两年呈先降后升的 V 型走势；2025 年基准约 5059 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2023 年均为 4 人，2024–2025 年缩至 2 人；2026 年计划 3 人，较 2025 年扩招 50%，招生名额增加使竞争有所缓解，但扩招幅度较大，对位次有显著后移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 93 名稳步上升至 2026 年第 81 名，近年排名持续提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；2022 年曾因师德师风事件获偏负面评价，2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合（空调费争议），整体舆情平稳；抖音热度总排名第 49（较热），2022 年曾排第 7（高热），近年关注度有所回落；未见明显投档断档记录；外国语言文学为 A+（全国顶尖），是学校核心王牌学科，与翻译、汉语国际教育等招生专业直接对应，对语言类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业社会热度为一般观望，整体平稳；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 154000 人，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类约 116360 人）明显增加，物理类考生数从约 83716 增至估算约 110880 人（增幅约 32%），竞争显著加剧；该校位于上海，对内蒙古考生有较强地域吸引力；2021 年该校在内蒙古招生占比约 1.13%，属中等偏低水平，跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅回升后的高位基准、2026 年计划扩招 50% 的供给增加、以及本省物理类考生数大幅增长约 32% 的需求端压力，供需两端均指向位次后移；扩招幅度与考生增幅大体对冲，但扩招对位次数字的推升作用略占主导；预测最低位次约 6607 名，区间 6107–7107 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 6894 → 4957 → 10758 → 9186 → 5059, with extreme fluctuations. In 2023, it plummeted to about 10758, and in 2025, it rebounded significantly to about 5059, showing a V-shaped trend of first decline and then rise in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 5059. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 4 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 2 students in 2024-2025. In 2026, the plan is 3 students, a 50% increase compared to 2025. The increase in enrollment slots alleviates competition, but the large expansion significantly pushes the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking steadily rose from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the school's comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, there was a negative evaluation due to a teacher ethics incident. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (air conditioning fee controversy), with overall public sentiment stable. Douyin popularity total ranking is 49th (relatively hot), previously ranked 7th in 2022 (very hot), with attention declining in recent years. No obvious admission cutoff break records. Foreign Language and Literature is A+ (top nationally), the core flagship discipline of the school, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Translation and Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages, strongly attracting language-oriented students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors is generally wait-and-see, overall stable. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in the province is about 154,000, significantly increased from 2025 (History Category + Physics Category about 116,360). The number of Physics Category examinees increased from about 83,716 to an estimated 110,880 (an increase of about 32%), intensifying competition. The university is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Inner Mongolia examinees. In 2021, the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia was about 1.13%, a moderately low level, with cross-province application popularity limited by regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the high baseline after the significant rebound in 2025 rankings, the supply increase from the 50% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the demand-side pressure from a roughly 32% increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, both supply and demand point to a backward shift in rankings. The expansion magnitude and examinee increase roughly offset each other, but the expansion's effect on pushing the ranking number upward slightly dominates. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6607, with a range of 6107 to 7107.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Natural Language Processing and Financial Big Data) (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
No other science enrollment majors currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Science only offers Data Science and Big Data Technology and Law. With rankings within the predicted range (6107-7107), it is recommended to take Law as a safe choice and Data Science as a reach target. Rankings significantly above the lower bound of the range can focus on aiming for Data Science and Big Data Technology.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 253→867→1193→947→963. In 2021, the ranking was extremely high (about 253rd), then significantly shifted back to the 800–1200 range. In the past 3 years, it stabilized around 950–1200; the 2025 baseline is about 963rd. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 3 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 5 in 2024, and to 6 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6 students, unchanged from 2025, with stable enrollment quotas.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; the main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking steadily rose from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2022, there was a somewhat negative evaluation due to a teacher ethics incident, while in 2026 the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (air conditioning fee controversy), with overall public opinion stable; Douyin popularity total ranking 49th (relatively hot), once ranked 7th in 2022 (very hot), with attention declining in recent years; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Foreign Language and Literature is A+ (top in the country), the core flagship discipline of the university, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Translation and Spanish, strongly attractive to language-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of foreign language majors is generally wait-and-see, overall stable; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 154,000, a significant increase from about 116,360 in 2025 (history + physics categories), with the number of history category candidates rising from about 32,644 to an estimated 43,120 (an increase of about 32%), significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates; in 2021, the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia was about 1.13%, a moderately low level, with cross-province application enthusiasm limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable trend of rankings in the 950–1200 range over the past 3 years, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the demand-side pressure from a significant increase of about 32% in the number of history category candidates in the province, the increase in candidates is the main factor driving the ranking backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 993rd, with a range of 493–1493.
